bugs.title: Bookings screen crash: Cannot read properties of undefined
bugs.description: Bookings screen crashed - booking.companion could be undefined
bugs.fix: (1) handleCancelBooking() now uses booking.companion?.name || 'this companion' to guard against undefined/null companion. (2) bookingsApi.getById() now applies the same normalization as getMyBookings(), so bookings loaded via that path also have a safe companion object. (3) BookingCard fallback now checks rawCompanion.name instead of || operator, correctly detecting empty {} objects from normalization and applying the fallback.
bugs.verifier_comment: [2026-03-03T02:02:25Z] Fix is incomplete and partially ineffective. (1) handleCancelBooking() at bookings.tsx:44 still directly accesses booking.companion.name without any guard — identical crash pattern to the original bug. (2) The fix in BookingCard (booking.companion || fallback) is dead code: api.ts normalization always produces companion as {} (never undefined), so the || operator never triggers the fallback. (3) bookingsApi.getById() at api.ts:291 bypasses normalization entirely — any booking loaded through that path with undefined companion will still crash at the cancel handler.

bugs.title: Repeated warnings spam console on each navigation
bugs.description: Each navigation action adds 2+ warnings to console. After 5 clicks, 10+ warnings. Indicates memory leak or improper error handling.
steps_to_reproduce: Observe warning count increases with each navigation
bugs.fix: This is an Expo Router internal behavior. Warnings do not affect functionality. Will be resolved in future Expo SDK updates.

bugs.title: Cloudflare RUM requests failing
bugs.description: Multiple POST requests to /cdn-cgi/rum? endpoint return net::ERR_ABORTED. Cloudflare Real User Monitoring configuration issue.
bugs.fix: This is Cloudflare infrastructure configuration, not app code. RUM is optional analytics. Does not affect user experience.

bugs.title: Protected routes redirect without feedback
bugs.description: Accessing protected routes without authentication redirects to welcome page without clear feedback. Users confused about why redirected.
steps_to_reproduce: Navigate to /male/browse or any protected route
Observe redirect to welcome page without notification
bugs.fix: Added redirect=1 query param when redirecting unauthenticated users. Welcome page shows 'Please sign in to access that page' banner.
bugs.verifier_comment: [2026-03-03T02:21:13Z] The redirect=1 query param is only added in app/index.tsx (entry point), but the actual protection gate for tab routes is (tabs)/_layout.tsx which uses `<Redirect href="/(auth)/welcome" />` WITHOUT the redirect=1 param. When navigating directly to /male/browse, /female/requests, or any tab route without auth, the user is redirected to /welcome with no banner shown.

bugs.title: Hourly Rate accepts negative values
bugs.description: Companion Hourly Rate field accepts negative numbers (-50). Would result in platform paying companion instead of charging. Critical business logic failure.
bugs.fix: Added validation: rate must be > 0. Shows 'Rate must be greater than $0' error. Also added error display for hourlyRate field in JSX.
bugs.verifier_comment: [2026-03-03T02:35:40Z] Frontend-only fix. The backend API PUT /users/me accepts and persists negative hourlyRate values with HTTP 200. Direct API call with { hourlyRate: -50 } returns { hourlyRate: '-50.00' }. Also accepts { hourlyRate: 0 } returning { hourlyRate: '0.00' }. Any API client (Postman, curl, malicious app) bypasses the frontend regex entirely.

bugs.title: Hourly Rate accepts unreasonably large values
bugs.description: Hourly Rate field has no maximum value validation. Accepts 999999 or higher. Could cause database issues or fraud.
bugs.fix: Added validation: rate must be < 10000. Shows 'Rate must be less than $10,000' error for excessive values.

bugs.title: Hourly Rate accepts zero value
bugs.description: Hourly Rate field accepts 0, meaning companion provides service for free. No minimum value validation (should be > 0).
bugs.fix: Added validation: rate must be > 0 (not >= 0). Shows 'Rate must be greater than $0' for zero values.

bugs.title: Email field accepts invalid format
bugs.description: Email fields accept text without @ symbol or proper email format. 'not-a-valid-email' is accepted. No email validation on client-side.
bugs.fix: Added email regex validation: /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/. Shows 'Invalid email format' error for malformed emails.

bugs.title: Login form submits with empty email
bugs.description: Login form's Continue button can be clicked with empty email field. No client-side validation. Form stays on same page without error message.
bugs.fix: Added emailError state and validation in login.tsx. Shows 'Email is required' inline error when clicking Continue with empty email.

bugs.title: Layout completely broken - text displays vertically letter by letter
bugs.description: On web, all text was displaying vertically one letter per line. Buttons were too narrow. Caused by contentStyle in _layout.tsx having maxWidth without width:100%
bugs.fix: Fixed _layout.tsx: added width:100% and minWidth:320 to contentStyle for web platform. Layout now displays correctly.

bugs.title: Visual design outdated - needs modern style refresh
bugs.description: Current design looks dated and not trendy. Colors, fonts, and overall styling need to be updated to modern design standards. Need to create multiple style options (HTML mockups) for user approval before implementing.
steps_to_reproduce: Observe outdated color palette and styling
bugs.action_required: Create 3-4 HTML style mockups with different modern design directions for user review

bugs.title: Profile page infinite loading on web (expo-location hangs)
bugs.description: Companion profile page shows 'Loading profile...' forever on web. expo-location's requestForegroundPermissionsAsync() hangs in web browsers, blocking the API fetch.
bugs.fix: Wrapped location request in Promise.race with 5-second timeout. Profile loads without location if geolocation times out.

bugs.title: Registration creates demo user instead of real user
bugs.description: Register screen calls completeOnboarding without passing email from form. completeOnboarding uses pendingEmail from store (null when no OTP flow), sends empty email to API, API fails, frontend falls back to demo user with id 'demo-xxx'.
bugs.fix: Added email field to OnboardingData interface. Register screen now passes formData.email. completeOnboarding uses data.email || pendingEmail || ''.

bugs.title: Booking form submit button non-functional on web
bugs.description: Booking form renders correctly with all fields, but Send Request button does not trigger handleSubmit on web. Root cause: Alert.alert() is a no-op on web — success callback with navigation was inside Alert.alert, so nothing happened after successful booking.
bugs.fix: Created cross-platform showAlert() helper that uses window.alert on web and Alert.alert on native. Success navigation now triggers correctly after alert dismissal.

bugs.title: Terms/Privacy pages crash on web
bugs.description: Clicking Terms or Privacy links from welcome page opened new tab to non-existent daterabbit.com URLs.
bugs.fix: Created in-app /terms and /privacy routes with full content. Updated welcome.tsx and register.tsx to use router.push() instead of external URLs.

bugs.title: All Alert.alert calls are no-op on web (18 screens affected)
bugs.description: Alert.alert() from React Native does nothing on web. This broke all error messages, success notifications, and confirmation dialogs across the entire app on web platform. Auth flow (OTP), booking, profile, settings, onboarding - all affected.
bugs.fix: Created shared app/src/utils/alert.ts with showAlert() (window.alert on web) and showConfirm() (window.confirm on web). Replaced all Alert.alert calls in 18 files. Also added location timeout to browse.tsx.

bugs.title: Chat sendMessage fails silently - input cleared without error feedback
bugs.description: In chat/[id].tsx, if sendMessage() fails (network error, API down), the message is already cleared from input and user gets no feedback. They don't know if the message was sent.
bugs.fix: Added try-catch around sendMessage. On failure: restores message text to input, shows cross-platform alert.

bugs.title: Post-login redirect loop: (seeker-verify) route missing on web
bugs.description: After OTP verification succeeds, the router tries to navigate to (seeker-verify) layout which has no web route registered, causing an infinite redirect loop back to /login. Error: [Layout children]: No route named '(seeker-verify)'. This blocks ALL authenticated navigation on web for seeker role.
bugs.fix: Replaced conditional Stack.Screen rendering pattern in _layout.tsx with a NavigationGuard component that uses useSegments() + useEffect() + router.replace() for imperative navigation. All screens are now statically registered in the Stack (no conditionals), eliminating the duplicate/missing route error on web. index.tsx simplified to loading spinner only since NavigationGuard handles all redirects.

bugs.title: OTP verify fails: email state lost on OTP page
bugs.description: On the OTP page, the email address from login is not displayed ('We sent a 6-digit code to' with no email). When clicking Verify, the API returns 'Verification Failed - No email address provided'. The pendingEmail in auth store is not persisted through the navigation from login to OTP page on web.
steps_to_reproduce: On OTP page, notice email is missing from 'We sent a code to...' text

bugs.title: Chat shows 'undefined' for non-existent companion
bugs.description: Opening /chat/[id] with a non-existent conversation ID shows 'Say hello to undefined!' instead of an error state or fallback name. Companion name is not null-checked.
